representatives.name: Mr Chung Boey

representatives.name: Mr Lau Chung-man Clement

charges.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug

offence_date.source: at about 1.20 am on 27 December 2022, the police arrived at Room 606D, Block B, Yau Tong Industrial City in Kwun Tong

offence_time.source: at about 1.20 am on 27 December 2022, the police arrived at Room 606D, Block B, Yau Tong Industrial City in Kwun Tong

place_of_offence.address: Room 606D, Block B, Yau Tong Industrial City, Kwun Tong
place_of_offence.source: at about 1.20 am on 27 December 2022, the police arrived at Room 606D, Block B, Yau Tong Industrial City in Kwun Tong

cross_border.source: No cross-border trafficking is mentioned in the judgment

trafficking_mode.source: he was mainly responsible for taking a quantity of cocaine from the Lei Yue Mun Plaza back to the room

roles_facts.source: he was mainly responsible for taking a quantity of cocaine from the Lei Yue Mun Plaza back to the room

reasons_for_offence.source: Because the 1st defendant was indebted so he agreed... he owed debts in the region of $300,000... he committed the present offence to earn quick money.

trafficking_mode.source: the 2nd defendant signed a tenancy agreement to rent the room... the plastic recycling bag (Exhibit E2) was already there when [1st defendant] arrived

roles_facts.source: he had rented the room and did not lock it, apparently for the purpose of allowing others to use it whenever they wanted

He made a total of 19 calls between 26 and 27 December 2022 to the 1st defendant... the only reasonable inference is that he made those calls either to give instructions to the 1st defendant or to check his progress
